name: Jantikalu

ingredients.name: 3 tbsp hot oil, for the dough

steps: Mix rice flour, besan, sesame, carom, chilli powder and salt; rub in the hot oil.
Knead with water into a smooth, pliable dough.
Fill the jantikalu press and squeeze spirals directly into hot oil.
Fry until the hissing stops and the spirals turn light gold.
Drain, cool and break into crunchy pieces — the everyday Telugu tea-time murukulu.
